sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58205" key="knisodiw/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κνῑσο-δῐώκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Fat-hunter</tr_>, name of a mouse, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:232" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">232</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
